---
name: Rule-pack contribution
about: Propose a custom rule pack or rule-pack improvement
title: "[Rule Pack]: "
labels: enhancement, rule-pack
assignees: ""
---

## Rule-Pack Goal

What policy, attack pattern, or review workflow should this pack cover?

## Synthetic Examples

Use synthetic content only.

```text
positive example
```

```text
negative example
```

## Expected Rules

- Rule ID:
- Severity:
- Scope: all / text / metadata

## Verification

```bash
openscholarguard rules verify path/to/rule-pack.json --require-tests
```

## Data Handling

- [ ] No confidential submissions, private reviews, or proprietary papers are included.
- [ ] Positive and negative embedded tests are included.
